title: genista pumila
intro: Genista pumila, also known as dwarf broom or small broom, is a low-growing, deciduous shrub native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Genista pumila include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. Genista pumila is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its herbal remedies, and it has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health issues.
